name: GOLFTEC Clearwater
about: GOLFTEC Clearwater is a golf training and club fitting facility that offers a high-tech environment for game improvement. They utilize advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven coaching and club fitting services. The venue specializes in personalized lesson plans, club fittings, and practice memberships to help golfers of all skill levels improve their swing and overall game.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed cameras
Personalized improvement plans with certified PGA award-winning coaches
Club fittings that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings. However, you are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any information regarding outside food or drink policies. It is best to contact the center directly for specific details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and club fitting using technology and bays, not on playing full 18-hole rounds. The time for a session varies based on the service booked.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers coaching and programs suitable for juniors and youth, though the website does not specify dedicated kid-friendly amenities or events.
